info.title: UGC Inc API
info.description: Public API surface for accounts, posts, comments, tasks, media, organization management, billing, statistics, and automations.

post.description: Retrieve accounts with optional filters
Create new account seats and update your subscription billing
Delete all posts from one or more accounts
Switch account niche by updating keywords and description, and resetting warmup
Check if custom provider account profiles are in sync with live social profiles
Reset or delete warmup activity for an account
Get account status and pending tasks
Check the health of active accounts and identify issues
Update account metadata for one or more accounts (tag, groups, keywords, profiles, description, warmup version)
Update account social profile for one or more accounts (username, avatar, nickname, bio)
Create a new automation template or update an existing one
Delete an automation template
Delete a run and its execution state
Export full template data for debugging and tooling
Export full run data including executor and edge state
Retrieve a single automation template
Retrieve all automation templates for the authenticated organization
List automation runs across templates
List runs for a specific automation template
Retrieve run logs ordered by creation time
Enable recurrence scheduling for an automation template
Get scheduling status for a recurring automation template
Start one or more runs for an automation template
Immediately trigger one manual run for a template
Get run state, executors, and execution edges
Stop an in-progress run
Disable recurrence scheduling for an automation template
Approve or reject an automation run
Validate an automation workflow definition without saving it

get.description: Get billing information including subscription details and linked organizations

post.description: Cancel your subscription at the end of the current billing period
Deactivate an account slot and remove it from your subscription
Get a Stripe billing portal URL for managing payment methods
Request a refund for an account
Request a replacement for an account

get.description: Get all billing requests (replacements and refunds)

post.description: Get comments for your organization
Create a comment on a TikTok post
Retrieve media files with optional filters
Create media records from files already uploaded to blob storage
Create text media entries from raw text content
Generate a Vercel Blob client token for direct media uploads
Delete one or more media items

get.description: Fetch media content by ID (supports preview/audio paths and HTTP range requests)

post.description: Filter source IDs into available vs used for a named media use-case
Retrieve social audio files with optional filters
Import audio from a TikTok or Instagram URL
Update the name of a media item
Update tags on one or more media items
Get media usage records for a specific use-case name

get.description: List organizations linked to your API key

post.description: Retrieve all API keys for your organization
Delete an API key from your organization
Update an API key's name
Retrieve all integration keys for your organization
Delete an integration key for a provider
Create or update an integration key for a provider
Update your organization's name
Retrieve posts with optional filters
Delete one or more posts
Preview finalized post times before creating or updating posts
Retry one or more failed posts
Create a slideshow post from multiple images
Get the status of a specific post
Update an existing scheduled or failed post in place
Create a video post
Retrieve account statistics with filters
Get pre-aggregated daily statistics for dashboard charts
Get per-post daily metric values and changes
Get the highest-performing accounts by a specific metric
Get the highest-performing posts by a specific metric
Retrieve pre-aggregated daily statistics for dashboard charts
Get per-account daily metric deltas
Retrieve post statistics with filters
Fetch live statistics from TikTok/Instagram API for all accounts in your organization

parameters.name: X-Stream-Progress
parameters.description: Set to `true` to receive newline-delimited JSON progress events instead of the standard JSON summary response.

post.description: Retrieve tasks with optional filters
Delete one or more scheduled or failed tasks
Retry one or more failed tasks
